title: Job Done 86600266 Path & Patio Cleaner, 2.5L - Outdoor Floor Cleaner for Pavements, Patios and Driveways - Visible Results In 10 Minutes - Ready To Use Solution
features: PATIO CLEANER: Concentrated outdoor cleaning solution for garden paths, patios and driveways
RESULTS: Fast acting formula with visible results in just 10 minutes
RESTORE: Brings back the natural colour to hard surfaces
NOT HARMFUL: Safely removes dirt, algae, and stains without harm to lawn or borders surrounding the area applied
COMBINE: Pair with Job done's Path Weedkiller for a complete solution to improving your garden path, patio and driveway
description: From the manufacturer About Job Done Job done is a revolutionary new weedkiller brand. Whether it is tackling the toughest of weeds, like Japanese Knotweed and Ivy, preventing re-growth or getting quick results, there’s a Job done weedkiller for every weed-related challenge in the garden. Satisfaction Guaranteed Job Done Path and Patio Cleaner 2.5L Are your paths, patios and driveways in need of a new lease of life? Path & Patio Cleaner is concentrated outdoor cleaning solution you need. Suitable for hard surfaces, it not only removes dirt, algae and stains, but also restores natural colour - and results can be seen in 10 minutes!
